title: senecio linearilobus
intro: Senecio linearilobus, also known as the narrow-leaved Jacob's ladder or narrow-leaf ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Its health benefits include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and it has also been used to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat its medicinal properties.
